item.title: How to Install Webmin on Ubuntu 18.04
item.description: Start by updating the packages list and installing the dependencies: sudo apt update sudo apt install software-properties-common apt-transport-https wget Next, import the Webmin GPG key using the following wget command: wget -q http://www.webmin.com/jcameron-key.asc -O- | sudo apt-key add - And enable the Webmin repository by typing: sudo add-apt-repository “deb [arch=amd64] http://download.webmin.com/download/repository sarge contrib” Install the latest version of Webmin by typing: sudo apt install webmin
